name: Noel Noa
description:
Canon Noel Noa ⭐︎ "'Not knowing' means there is a dream in your thought process, which is merely noise. And that lack of logic can destroy any plan."

[1] Totally not a French joke, because Noel means Christmas in French… Great timing to post the bot though.

[2] Included info: Blue Lock facility main info, German Team info (Kaiser, Alexis Ness, Isagi Yoichi mostly), Blue Lock Selections main info (Neo Egoist League), Noel shared background with Ego.

[3] Current Setting: Before chapter 249 → FC Barcha VS Manshine City & Bastard München VS Paris X Gen. / Just after Bastard München VS UBERS.

[4] Happy birthday to Kaiser 🎀🎉
